description: Main source file of a Flutter-based application implementing a campus helper with features like CGPA calculation, attendance tracking, and internal marks estimation. Contains theme configuration, local storage wrapper, multiple pages (CGPA, Attendance, Internals), and common UI components.

classes.name: AppColors
classes.description: Defines the color scheme for the application, including primary, secondary, success, error, background, surface, and text colors.

classes.name: LocalStore
classes.description: A utility class wrapping SharedPreferences for storing and retrieving JSON maps; supports asynchronous creation and read/write operations.

classes.name: StoreKeys
classes.description: Contains static string keys for storing different categories in local storage (CGPA, attendance, internals).

classes.name: CampusHelperApp
classes.description: Root widget of the app, handling theme setup and initial store creation.

classes.name: HomeShell
classes.description: Main app shell with bottom navigation to switch between CGPA, Attendance, and Internals pages.

classes.name: CalcCard
classes.description: Reusable container widget for grouping input sections with a title, optional subtitle, and child content.

classes.name: _HintText
classes.description: Styled text widget for displaying hints or explanatory notes.

classes.name: _ResultPill
classes.description: Styled label-widget displaying result with color indicator.

classes.name: _NumberField
classes.description: Customized TextField widget for numeric input with label, hint, and optional suffix.

classes.name: CgpaPage
classes.description: Page for calculating weighted CGPA based on current CGPA, credits, and latest SGPA and credits.

classes.name: _CgpaPageState
classes.description: State object managing input controllers, calculations, persistence, and UI update logic for CGPA calculator.

classes.name: AttendancePage
classes.description: Page to input attendance data and compute attendance percentage and advice for bunking or attending more classes.

classes.name: _AttendancePageState
classes.description: State class implementing logic for attendance calculations, input persistence, and advice generation.

classes.name: InternalsPage
classes.description: Page to estimate internal marks based on two internals, assignment, attendance, and customizable total internal mark scale.

classes.name: _InternalsPageState
classes.description: State class managing internals calculation, storage, and UI rendering.

methods.name: main
methods.description: Application entry point that runs CampusHelperApp.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Static async method to initialize a LocalStore with SharedPreferences.

methods.name: readJsonMap
methods.description: Reads a JSON-encoded map from SharedPreferences for a given key.

methods.name: writeJsonMap
methods.description: Serializes and stores a map as a JSON string in SharedPreferences.

methods.name: _initStore
methods.description: Initializes the LocalStore instance asynchronously when the app starts.

methods.name: _load
methods.description: Loads persisted data into input controllers.

methods.name: _persistDebounced
methods.description: Schedules a write operation to persist the current input state, avoiding rapid repeated saves.

methods.name: _calculate
methods.description: Performs calculation based on input values for each feature (CGPA, attendance, internals) and updates the UI.

methods.name: _clear
methods.description: Clears input fields and resets state for each calculator page.
